allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xzkmcnqetvkpxhdvevow/database/query -H 'Authorization: Bearer sbp_a6b573467e2094e97e2b400d5c6ef79f5be68f8b' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"select name, category, service_mode, price from public.items where is_active = true order by category, price"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xzkmcnqetvkpxhdvevow/database/query -H 'Authorization: Bearer sbp_a6b573467e2094e97e2b400d5c6ef79f5be68f8b' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"select table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema = '\\''public'\\'' and table_name like '\\''%manicurist%'\\'' order by table_name"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xzkmcnqetvkpxhdvevow/database/query -H 'Authorization: Bearer sbp_a6b573467e2094e97e2b400d5c6ef79f5be68f8b' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"select p.id, p.email, p.role, m.id as manicurist_id from public.profiles p left join public.manicurists m on m.profile_id = p.id where p.role = '\\''manicurist'\\'';"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xzkmcnqetvkpxhdvevow/database/query -H 'Authorization: Bearer sbp_a6b573467e2094e97e2b400d5c6ef79f5be68f8b' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"select constraint_name, constraint_type from information_schema.table_constraints where table_schema = '\\''public'\\'' and table_name = '\\''manicurists'\\'';"}')
